## Summary

Explain what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `node scripts/notebook-video.mjs validate-skill`
- [ ] `node scripts/notebook-video.mjs validate-official-example`
- [ ] Dependency audit completed
- [ ] No credentials, caches, `node_modules` or generated renders were added
- [ ] Font, audio and third-party notices are preserved

For visual or timing changes:

- [ ] Attached representative frames or a short range render
- [ ] Checked the opening, scene boundaries, longest subtitle and final frame
- [ ] Completed a full validated render before proposing a new official default

## Remaining risk

List anything that was not tested and why.
